title: Verify successful registration flow with valid data

steps.action: Click 'Next' on the intro screen
Select gender
Select a valid date of birth with age 18+
Enter a valid name or nickname
Enter a valid email address
Enter a valid password with at least 5 characters and accept the Terms and Policies checkbox
Click 'Next'

expected_result: User successfully completes the registration flow and is redirected to the next expected page without validation errors.

title: Verify validation messages for empty required fields
preconditions: User is on a step with a required input field

steps.action: Go to Step 4 and leave the name field empty
Click 'Next'
Go to Step 5 and leave the email field empty
Click 'Next'
Go to Step 6 and leave the password field empty
Click 'Next'

expected_result: Correct validation messages are displayed for empty required fields. User cannot proceed until valid data is entered.

title: Verify validation for invalid date of birth

steps.action: Select a non-existing date of birth, for example November 31
Click 'Next'

expected_result: User cannot proceed with a non-existing date of birth. A relevant validation message is displayed.

title: Verify only one option can be selected in single-choice blocks
preconditions: User is on Step 2 or any other step with single-choice options

steps.action: Select one option
Select another option from the same block

expected_result: Only one option remains selected. Previously selected option is automatically unselected.

title: Verify required policy links in footer and consent checkbox

steps.action: Check the policy links in the footer
Check the policy links near the Terms and Policies checkbox
Click each policy link

expected_result: All required policy links are displayed, correctly formatted, clickable, and lead to the correct pages.
